title: rosa × geminata var. fourraei
intro: Rosa × geminata var. fourraei, also known as Fourreau's hybrid rose, is a hybrid rose species that is native to Europe. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as a treatment for digestive issues, due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, including relief from diarrhea, stomach cramps, and other gastrointestinal disorders. Rosa × geminata var. fourraei is traditionally prepared in herbal infusions and teas, as well as in tinctures and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
